name: Separating Expert Retention from Autonomous Source Inference in Raw-ECG-Replay-Free Continual ECG Deployment
summary: arXiv:2607.01674v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In multi-source ECG deployment, models may need to incorporate new data sources when earlier raw ECGs cannot be retained or replayed. Freezing a...
description: arXiv:2607.01674v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In multi-source ECG deployment, models may need to incorporate new data sources when earlier raw ECGs cannot be retained or replayed. Freezing a pretrained backbone and assigning each source an isolated classifier prevents parameter interference, but deployment still requires selecting an expert when source metadata are unavailable. We study t...
author: Yufan Lu, Xinhui Liu, Chenyang Xu, Yuxi Zhou, Hao Wang
